response.rule: 16 plus cumulative squares of consecutive primes starting with 3²
a(n)=n·a(n-1)+(-1)^n p_n, where p_n is the nth prime
Odd-position terms are Catalan numbers; even-position terms are powers of 3
64 plus cumulative cubes of consecutive composite integers starting with 6³
